last_added.title: The world just tilted toward Beijing: for the first time in about 20 years of polling, more countries view China favourably than the United States, Pew finds — China leads in 25 of 36 nations
The Iran war reaches India's tax code: New Delhi almost doubles the 'windfall tax' on diesel and jet-fuel exports to ₹15.5 and ₹14.5 a litre as oil spikes
